728 GG0170G3_CAR_TRNSFR_END_CD GG0170G3_CAR_TRNSFR_END_CD GG0170G3 Car Transfer End Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to transfer in and out of a car or van on the passenger side (does not include the ability to open/close door or fasten seat belt) at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
